sp_widget.description: Calendar widget for students to browse and book available German lesson slots (Mon/Wed/Fri)
sp_widget.name: German Lesson Booking Calendar
sp_widget.template:
{{c.weekLabel}}

You already have a lesson booked this week. You can book again next week.
{{c.message}}
{{day.label}} {{day.display}}
No slots
Confirm booking: {{c.selectedSlot.date}} {{c.selectedSlot.label}}
